programmes.show_description: All-Stars: Hunted Humans. All-Stars: Hunted Humans. 13 all-star survivalists try to survive for 40 days in Africa's Selati Basin. When one group scavenges meat, hungry predators stalk their camp. S3,
All-Stars: Africa Strikes First. One survivalist is attacked by a venomous predator just three days into the challenge. And, the group compete with aggressive wildlife for resources. S3, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Blacksburg Barn. The team races to salvage an 1800s barn in Blacksburg, VA, before a hurricane rolls in. Later, they turn part of an airplane into a stunning desk. S10, Ep1
Bluefield House. The team go to the Bluefield House in West Virginia to restock classic warehouse commodities. Plus, they head up north to deliver a large lamppost. S10, Ep2
No Jane, No Gain - Part 1. A brand-new arrival shakes up the gold game as Emily shows Jane Kilcher the ropes of running a dredge. Kris Kelly deals with an excavator malfunction. S11, Ep7
No Jane, No Gain - Part 2. A brand-new arrival shakes up the gold game as Emily shows Jane Kilcher the ropes of running a dredge. Kris Kelly deals with an excavator malfunction. S11, Ep8
The Gibsons. Paul Mackie and his team of experts travel to the unforgiving Western Australian Pilbara to help an Indigenous family gold mine save itself from financial disaster. S1, Ep2
A Fatal Mistake. First, Julia catches a small venomous snake hidden under an air conditioning box. Plus, an eastern brown snake is spotted in a customer's garden. S1, Ep5
Bitter Tears. Weeks into the opilio season, delirium sets in - and deadly mistakes are made. But for one fisherman it is a tragedy on land that causes heartbreak at sea. S5, Ep14
Day Of Reckoning. The opilio season is almost over, but a storm front has the skippers on edge. The boats race to plug their tanks with crab, but can they make it back unscathed? S5, Ep15
The Opposite Of Paradise. The team gear up for their first venture onto Snake Island, where they'll face triple-digit heat and one of the world's deadliest vipers. S1, Ep2
World's 8th Wonder. Josh journeys from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. He retraces the steps of Nazi soldiers. S1, Ep3
Amelia Earhart. Josh Gates hunts down new evidence on the disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He starts in Papua New Guinea, ending his journey in Fiji, hoping to find her remains. S1, Ep4
When Cows Attack. The Raneys arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build. S1, Ep13
The Bears And The Bees. The Raneys arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Plus, dangerous winds threaten the bathhouse. S1, Ep14
Battling Back. The Fire Crew's season rests on a knife-edge as they battle their way back from a disastrous setback. Plus, the Opal Queen mines rock hard walls alone. S2, Ep11
Make Or Break. Justin tackles a deal that could make or break him. And, the Boulder Boys race to save their claim from a monsoon flood while the Cooke Brothers hit pay dirt. S2, Ep12
Carpe Diem. A new face joins the fold - 23-year-old Sean Dwyer fighting for the legacy of his father. Plus, Captain Keith's life spirals, and Sig torments his old protégé. S12, Ep1
Gold On The Line. Frustrations reach a breaking point between Chambo and Andy. For Todd, it comes down to a single gold weigh to keep his crew intact. S2, Ep7
Forged In Fury. Sig risks capsizing when his tank floods in an Arctic storm. Sophia must prove she can lead in severe weather while Jake battles insubordination. S20, Ep7
A broken excavator shuts down the Ferals' operation. Jacqui finds the biggest nugget of her career, while the Poseidon Crew uncover a rubbish tip. S6, Ep17
All-Stars: Africa Strikes Twice. One survivalist takes a huge risk to secure a big kill for his team. Plus, torrential rain and plummeting temperatures forces someone to leave. S3, Ep3
All-Stars: To Hail And Back. Freezing rainstorms torture the remaining survivalists, risking severe hypothermia. Plus, a successful hunt ends up backfiring. S3, Ep4

Teleshopping.
Lexington Storefront. The team are in Lexington, VA, where a refurbished storefront is being renovated rather than destroyed. They turn the windowpanes into a room divider. S10, Ep3
Alexandria Church. The guys visit Alexandria, VA, to salvage a church and save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. And they must get creative! S10, Ep4
Brawl Of Duty - Part 1. As tempers flare, the conflict between Shawn and the Kellys becomes physical. Meanwhile, mechanical difficulties plague the Mistress. S11, Ep9
Brawl Of Duty - Part 2. As tempers flare, the conflict between Shawn and the Kellys becomes physical. Meanwhile, mechanical difficulties plague the Mistress. S11, Ep10
Chris And Vince. Paul Mackie and the team try to find the causes of a two-year dry streak that threatens to end the dreams of rookie prospectors Chris Moore and Vince Federici. S1, Ep3
The Emergency Surgery. Today, Julia is assisted by her husband, John. Together, they catch the second most venomous snake in the world in a cramped laundry room. S1, Ep6
Shipwrecked. The 2009 crab season is almost over, and a savage storm causes multiple maydays. Can the Coast Guard save four men before their boat is pounded against the rocks? S5, Ep16
Slow Burn. The crab season starts with tensions high. Blood isn't thicker than salt water on the Cornelia Marie, there's deckhand poaching afoot and the fleet loses a vessel. S6, Ep1
A Steep Price. A discovery on the island fires up the team. But as excitement builds, some dangerous encounters threaten to end the mission - and people's lives. S1, Ep3
City Of Gold. Josh treks the Inca Trail through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of a mythical city of gold. His journey takes a detour to the ruins of Machu Picchu. S1, Ep5
Captain Morgan's Lost Gold. Josh dives into the Lajas Reef in search of the treasure of legendary pirate Henry Morgan. His journey takes him to a modern marvel, the Panama Canal. S1, Ep6
Ozark Mountain Misery. The Raneys head off to answer an SOS call from an off-grid couple. But with severe storms threatening floods, they are in a race against Mother Nature. S1, Ep15
Methane Meltdown. The Raneys try to restore a failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the property. S1, Ep16
Last Chance. The end of the mining season is near. The Rookies gamble their hopes on one last haul of opal and the Opal Queen makes a final desperate dig. S2, Ep13
The Young Guns face an uncertain future when James gets injured. The Bushmen find opal on the boundary of their mine, and rain slows down the Cheals. S5, Ep1
First Timers. Captain Sean Dwyer and his crew prepare for their first crab season aboard the Brenna A. Jake fears he made a big mistake, and Wild Bill faces a challenging deckhand. S12, Ep2
No Good Deed. Wild Bill risks his biggest lead to bail Josh out of trouble and Sean finds out if he's got what it takes. Plus, can veteran skipper Johnathan turn his season around? S12, Ep3
Back For Seconds. A surprise twist sends the crew into overdrive while they're already battling freezing temperatures to deliver this dream home. S15, Ep3
Appalachian Ancestry. The team travels to Berea, Kentucky to save a masterpiece of Appalachian craftsmanship - an incredible log cabin built in 1795. S15, Ep3
The Poseidon Crew clash over a decision to switch claims. Shane and Russell receive help from a gyrocopter, and the Ferals are hit by exhaustion. S6, Ep18
